messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Pipeline-board refinement: wider slug, an updated-at footer bumped only on content change, and repost-at-bottom so the board is the latest topic message
How it works: A longer title fills the wider slug on the same row

messages.text: BL-462 - Pipeline-board refinement: wider slug, an updated-at footer bumped only on content change, and repost-at-bottom so the board is the latest topic message is complete.
